name: skeleton
description: A shimmer-animated layout placeholder that reserves space while real content loads. Five shape presets (lines/card/avatar-row/image/button-bar), three sizes, active/inactive toggle. role=status + aria-live for AT; shimmer suppressed under prefers-reduced-motion (via skeleton.css). Zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies skeleton.jte + skeleton.css to your project. The shimmer animation uses --lv-skeleton-bg and --lv-skeleton-shimmer tokens (net-new; added to lievit-tokens.css by `lievit add skeleton`). Call as @template.lievit.skeleton(skeletonShape=..., skeletonRows=..., active=...). The source is yours: edit freely.
